{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EAbVALfeKp4ARR8fjJrXo1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Product Requirements Document\n     2→\n     3→## Project Name\n     4→\n     5→Bookmate\n     6→\n     7→## Overview\n     8→\n     9→Bookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n    10→\n    11→**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n    12→\n    13→## Goals\n    14→\n    15→- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n    16→- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n    17→- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n    18→\n    19→## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n    20→\n    21→### User Authentication\n    22→\n    23→Email + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n    24→\n    25→### Create a Reading Listing\n    26→\n    27→A user creates a listing with:\n    28→- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n    29→- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n    30→- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n    31→- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n    32→- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n    33→- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n    34→\n    35→### Browse Listings\n    36→\n    37→Simple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n    38→\n    39→### Join a Listing\n    40→\n    41→Any authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n    42→\n    43→### Group Formation\n    44→\n    45→When a listing reaches its max group size:\n    46→- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n    47→- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n    48→- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n    49→\n    50→### Notifications\n    51→\n    52→Email + in-app notifications for:\n    53→- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n    54→- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n    55→\n    56→### User Profile (Basic)\n    57→\n    58→- Display name\n    59→- Short bio\n    60→\n    61→## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n    62→\n    63→### Search and Filters\n    64→\n    65→- Search listings by book title or author\n    66→- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n    67→- Browsable feed with sorting options\n    68→\n    69→### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n    70→\n    71→Provide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n    72→\n    73→### Extended User Profile\n    74→\n    75→- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n    76→- \"Currently reading\" list\n    77→- Favorite genres\n    78→\n    79→## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n    80→\n    81→### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n    82→\n    83→System auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n    84→\n    85→### Applicant Approval System\n    86→\n    87→Listing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n    88→\n    89→### Rating and Reputation System\n    90→\n    91→Users can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n    92→\n    93→### Discord Support\n    94→\n    95→Allow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n    96→\n    97→## Non-Goals\n    98→\n    99→- No payment or monetization features\n   100→- No mobile app (web only)\n   101→- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n   102→- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n   103→- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n   104→- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n   105→\n   106→## Tech Stack\n   107→\n   108→- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n   109→- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n   110→- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n   111→- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n   112→- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n   113→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"24dc3422-7d77-4f75-aa8a-79a86d96e341","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:00:12.953Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/PRD.md","content":"# Product Requirements Document\n\n## Project Name\n\nBookmate\n\n## Overview\n\nBookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n\n**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n\n## Goals\n\n- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n\n## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n\n### User Authentication\n\nEmail + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n\n### Create a Reading Listing\n\nA user creates a listing with:\n- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n\n### Browse Listings\n\nSimple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n\n### Join a Listing\n\nAny authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n\n### Group Formation\n\nWhen a listing reaches its max group size:\n- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n\n### Notifications\n\nEmail + in-app notifications for:\n- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n\n### User Profile (Basic)\n\n- Display name\n- Short bio\n\n## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n\n### Search and Filters\n\n- Search listings by book title or author\n- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n- Browsable feed with sorting options\n\n### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n\nProvide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n\n### Extended User Profile\n\n- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n- \"Currently reading\" list\n- Favorite genres\n\n## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n\n### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n\nSystem auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n\n### Applicant Approval System\n\nListing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n\n### Rating and Reputation System\n\nUsers can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n\n### Discord Support\n\nAllow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n\n## Non-Goals\n\n- No payment or monetization features\n- No mobile app (web only)\n- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n","numLines":113,"startLine":1,"totalLines":113}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01D357V43SfZW6g9k93bRjeK","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Agent Memory\n     2→\n     3→## Project\n     4→- **Name**: Bookmate\n     5→- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n     6→- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n     7→- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n     8→- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n     9→\n    10→## Current State\n    11→- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n    12→- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n    13→- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n    14→- Build passes clean, lint has 6 warnings (img elements — intentional for Open Library covers)\n    15→- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n    16→- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n    17→\n    18→## Production\n    19→- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n    20→- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n    21→- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n    22→- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n    23→- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n    24→- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n    25→- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n    26→- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n    27→\n    28→## Open PRs\n    29→- #39: Production deployment (feat/production-deploy) — awaiting CI + merge\n    30→\n    31→## Open Issues\n    32→- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — stale\n    33→\n    34→## Important Notes\n    35→- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n    36→- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n    37→- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n    38→- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n    39→- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n    40→- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n    41→- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n    42→- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n    43→- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n    44→- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n    45→- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n    46→- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n    47→- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n    48→- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n    49→- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n    50→- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n    51→- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n    52→- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n    53→- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n    54→- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n    55→\n    56→## Next Session Priority\n    57→1. Check PR #39 (production deploy) — merge if CI passes\n    58→2. Propose domain + HTTPS setup (needs-human for domain registration)\n    59→3. Check issue #21 for human response on Telegram token\n    60→4. Consider proposing improvements: health check endpoint, monitoring\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"9ef9349b-5307-486d-9d6c-9b751dfbd450","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:00:18.043Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/MEMORY.md","content":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint has 6 warnings (img elements — intentional for Open Library covers)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- #39: Production deployment (feat/production-deploy) — awaiting CI + merge\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — stale\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check PR #39 (production deploy) — merge if CI passes\n2. Propose domain + HTTPS setup (needs-human for domain registration)\n3. Check issue #21 for human response on Telegram token\n4. Consider proposing improvements: health check endpoint, monitoring\n","numLines":61,"startLine":1,"totalLines":61}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Gn5C2ALPiRYYiHuCNhFhuv","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Learned Patterns\n     2→\n     3→## GitHub Authentication\n     4→- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n     5→  ```bash\n     6→  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n     7→  ```\n     8→- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n     9→- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n    10→\n    11→## Session Flow\n    12→- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n    13→- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n    14→- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n    15→\n    16→## Environment\n    17→- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n    18→- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n    19→- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n    20→- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n    21→- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n    22→- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n    23→\n    24→## Build\n    25→- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n    26→- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n    27→- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n    28→- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n    29→- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n    30→\n    31→## Browser Testing\n    32→- agent-browser WORKS with: `export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"`\n    33→- Crashes after extended use (~5+ min) due to Chromium memory pressure\n    34→- Restart between recording scenes: `agent-browser close && rm -rf $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/agent-browser/ && sleep 2`\n    35→- For snapshot timeouts on pages with many elements (e.g., book search dropdown), use `agent-browser screenshot` or JS eval instead\n    36→- Book search results can't use `find text` (multiple matches) — use JS: `document.querySelector(\"button[type=button].w-full\").click()`\n    37→- Reading pace input ref (@e17) times out — use `agent-browser eval` with nativeInputValueSetter to set values\n    38→- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n    39→- ffmpeg: static binary at ~/bin/ffmpeg — `export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"` needed each session\n    40→- When recording demos: login user BEFORE starting recording, then navigate to target page\n    41→\n    42→## Deployment\n    43→- No root/sudo access — can't apt-get install, create systemd services, or install nginx\n    44→- PM2 available via npx (not global): `npx pm2 start/stop/restart/list/logs`\n    45→- Deploy script: `./scripts/deploy.sh` (pull, install, build, restart PM2)\n    46→- Production runs on port 3000 directly (no reverse proxy)\n    47→- Public IP: 89.167.127.85 (IPv4), 2a01:4f9:c013:600f::1 (IPv6)\n    48→- Kill stale dev servers before deploy: check `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`\n    49→- PM2 ecosystem config at `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n    50→- PM2 logs at `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n    51→\n    52→## Working Directory\n    53→- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n    54→- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n    55→- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n    56→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"9f5ef9a2-d06d-49e8-b9db-a674a27636ab","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:00:18.487Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md","content":"# Learned Patterns\n\n## GitHub Authentication\n- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n  ```bash\n  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n  ```\n- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n\n## Session Flow\n- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n\n## Environment\n- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n\n## Build\n- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n\n## Browser Testing\n- agent-browser WORKS with: `export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"`\n- Crashes after extended use (~5+ min) due to Chromium memory pressure\n- Restart between recording scenes: `agent-browser close && rm -rf $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/agent-browser/ && sleep 2`\n- For snapshot timeouts on pages with many elements (e.g., book search dropdown), use `agent-browser screenshot` or JS eval instead\n- Book search results can't use `find text` (multiple matches) — use JS: `document.querySelector(\"button[type=button].w-full\").click()`\n- Reading pace input ref (@e17) times out — use `agent-browser eval` with nativeInputValueSetter to set values\n- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n- ffmpeg: static binary at ~/bin/ffmpeg — `export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"` needed each session\n- When recording demos: login user BEFORE starting recording, then navigate to target page\n\n## Deployment\n- No root/sudo access — can't apt-get install, create systemd services, or install nginx\n- PM2 available via npx (not global): `npx pm2 start/stop/restart/list/logs`\n- Deploy script: `./scripts/deploy.sh` (pull, install, build, restart PM2)\n- Production runs on port 3000 directly (no reverse proxy)\n- Public IP: 89.167.127.85 (IPv4), 2a01:4f9:c013:600f::1 (IPv6)\n- Kill stale dev servers before deploy: check `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`\n- PM2 ecosystem config at `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- PM2 logs at `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n\n## Working Directory\n- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n","numLines":56,"startLine":1,"totalLines":56}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01QYuuWcqz74PNyW8sRHyLX9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Interesting! Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and get the token\n2. Set these env vars in \\`app/.env.local\\`:\n   - \\`TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=<your-token>\\`\n   - \\`TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL=http://89.167.127.85:3000/api/telegram/webhook\\`\n3. All working. Now let me think about what to work on.\n\nThe project is in good shape. All features done, deployed. Let me think about valuable improvements:\n\n1. **Health check endpoint** - useful for monitoring (/api/health)\n2. **Error page improvements** - custom 404/500 pages\n3. **SEO improvements** - Open Graph meta tags, proper page titles\n4. **Performance** - maybe image optimization\n5. **Accessibility** - could improve ARIA labels, keyboard navigation\n\nGiven the stable state, let me propose and implement a health check endpoint (small but useful for monitoring), and maybe some other production-readiness improvements.\n\n\nActually, I should step back and test the app directly to see if there are any real UX issues or bugs I'm missing. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HyhZQp18Rvq7wCWq6kiras","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Pages look clean. The production app is working well. Now let me decide what to work on. The project is in a good stable state. All features done, production running.\n\nLet me think about valuable improvements:\n\n1. **Health check endpoint** (`/api/health`) - returns DB connectivity, uptime, version info. Useful for monitoring.\n2. **SEO improvements** - per-page meta tags, Open Graph tags for social sharing (listings could have nice preview cards when shared)\n3. **Error pages** - custom 404 and error pages that match the app's design\n4. **Performance** - could add caching headers, optimize images\n\n\n5. **Accessibility** - review and improve\n\nFor a newly launched app, the highest-impact improvements would be a health check endpoint for monitoring, Open Graph tags to make listings shareable on social media, and custom error pages. Let me start by implementing the health check endpoint and see if one already exists.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1299,"cache_read_input_tokens":30992,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1299},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"eea63adb-06a4-4975-973b-03f99ef53933"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y65XqypBXgTPzqFsnLh8LP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  return NextResponse.json({\n    24→    user: {\n    25→      id: user.id,\n    26→      email: user.email,\n    27→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    28→      bio: user.bio,\n    29→    },\n    30→  });\n    31→}\n    32→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"f458d2e7-f386-4649-b653-ef9cf503598d","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:02:46.047Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts","content":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as\n    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    user: {\n      id: user.id,\n      email: user.email,\n      displayName: user.display_name,\n      bio: user.bio,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","numLines":32,"startLine":1,"totalLines":32}}}

Let me check the API route for listings to see what data is available.\n\nActually, for OG tags on the listing page, I'd need to convert it to a server component or add a `generateMetadata` function. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018KZuLicwHnutWBaXU4nyC5","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G4y8xQr8TuP3zeSbALWXpf","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/health/route.ts","content":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst startTime = Date.now();\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  try {\n    // Check database connectivity\n    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n\n    // Get basic stats\n    const stats = db.prepare(`\n      SELECT\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      status: \"healthy\",\n      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n      stats: {\n        users: stats.users,\n        listings: stats.listings,\n        openListings: stats.open_listings,\n      },\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        status: \"unhealthy\",\n        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n        database: \"error\",\n        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1876,"cache_read_input_tokens":36471,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1876},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"33217530-49f5-4bc9-a4ff-d59d760a59f7"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01G4y8xQr8TuP3zeSbALWXpf","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/health/route.ts"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"4b47d0f8-373e-4d13-add4-3ac31a3cf5c3","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:03:03.688Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/health/route.ts","content":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst startTime = Date.now();\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  try {\n    // Check database connectivity\n    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n\n    // Get basic stats\n    const stats = db.prepare(`\n      SELECT\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      status: \"healthy\",\n      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n      stats: {\n        users: stats.users,\n        listings: stats.listings,\n        openListings: stats.open_listings,\n      },\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        status: \"unhealthy\",\n        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n        database: \"error\",\n        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HE8JLTupR6vTRFZdQVJpEv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G8W8s1W8q6qxMCmeK8QUU5","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/not-found.tsx","content":"import Link from \"next/link\";\n\nexport default function NotFound() {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"text-center py-20\">\n      <h1\n        className=\"text-6xl font-bold mb-4\"\n        style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n      >\n        404\n      </h1>\n      <h2\n        className=\"text-2xl mb-2\"\n        style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}\n      >\n        Page not found\n      </h2>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-8 max-w-md mx-auto\"\n        style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n      >\n        The page you&apos;re looking for doesn&apos;t exist or has been moved.\n        Maybe you&apos;ll find a great book to read instead?\n      </p>\n      <Link href=\"/\" className=\"btn-primary\" style={{ padding: \"0.75rem 2rem\" }}>\n        Browse listings\n      </Link>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":954,"cache_read_input_tokens":38347,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":954},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"72916cf9-c4e7-41af-8e5f-9213404648a6"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016WUVKXEXysFiSpLseKhXef","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET(\n     8→  _req: NextRequest,\n     9→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    10→) {\n    11→  const { id } = await params;\n    12→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    13→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\n    19→      `SELECT\n    20→        l.*,\n    21→        u.display_name as author_name\n    22→      FROM listings l\n    23→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    24→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    27→\n    28→  if (!listing) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    30→  }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"cfb3d2d4-2b69-490a-a89b-63ee3e302de9","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:03:20.235Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }","numLines":30,"startLine":1,"totalLines":103}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01VuxSoZ2rMKF7gXnoRJgEbh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"For OG metadata on listing pages, I need to add a `generateMetadata` function. Since the page.tsx is a client component, I can either:\n\n1. Create a layout.tsx for the [id] directory with generateMetadata\n2. Rename the current page.tsx to a client component and create a new server page.tsx wrapper\n\nThe cleanest approach for Next.js App Router is to create a separate `generateMetadata` function. But since the page is \"use client\", I can't export `generateMetadata` from it. I'll need to split it.\n\nLet me create a wrapper: rename the current file to a client component import and create a server page that provides metadata.\n\n\nActually, I'll go with the simpler approach—move the client component logic to a separate file and create a server-side page.tsx that handles the metadata generation and renders the client component.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":756,"cache_read_input_tokens":39977,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":756},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"4df1130f-992f-455e-b32a-ed9dddb47a4e"}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"74fe8e43-f2f4-4b23-afdf-38b9fec62075","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:03:45.735Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx","oldString":"export default function ListingDetailPage() {","newString":"export default function ListingDetail() {","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n  currentUserId: number | null;\n  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  // Discord state\n  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Rating state\n  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n      setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    } else if (res.status === 404) {\n      setNotAvailable(true);\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (!id) return;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.givenRatings) {\n        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n        }\n        setGivenRatings(given);\n        setRatingScores(scores);\n        setRatingComments(comments);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n\n  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n    if (!score) return;\n    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n          ratedUserId: memberId,\n          score,\n          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n      } else {\n        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n        }));\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n    } finally {\n      setRatingSaving(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n    setDiscordSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDiscordSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (notAvailable) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Browse other listings\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            {listing.requires_approval ? (\n              <span\n                className=\"badge mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                  color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Approval required\n              </span>\n            ) : null}\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Chat platform section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference !== \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.telegramBotConfigured && !showManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoTelegramLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Create a Telegram group with one click — the bot will\n                        automatically generate an invite link for your readers.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoTelegram}\n                        disabled={autoTelegramLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoTelegramLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Create Telegram Group Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Click the link below to create the group:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoTelegramLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Open Telegram & Create Group\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Telegram will open and ask you to create a group</li>\n                        <li>Name it something like &quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</li>\n                        <li>The bot will automatically generate an invite link</li>\n                        <li>All members will be notified — no manual steps needed!</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After creating the group, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual setup (shown as fallback or when bot is not configured) */}\n              {(!listing.telegramBotConfigured || showManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                      How to create a Telegram group:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                      <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                      <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                      <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                      <li>\n                        Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                        <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                      </li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                        value={telegramLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {telegramLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Telegram link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                      disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                    >\n                      {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Discord channel section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\" style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}>\n            <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n              <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 3.9495-1.5219 6.0023-3.0294a.077.077 0 00.0313-.0552c.5004-5.177-.8382-9.6739-3.5485-13.6604a.061.061 0 00-.0312-.0286zM8.02 15.3312c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9555-2.4189 2.157-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n            </svg>\n            Discord Channel\n          </h2>\n\n          {listing.discord_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Discord server to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.discord_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{\n                  display: \"inline-flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Discord Server\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.discord_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Discord server (or use an existing one) and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when Discord bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.discordBotConfigured && !showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoDiscordLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server — it will\n                        automatically create a reading group channel and invite link.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoDiscord}\n                        disabled={autoDiscordLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0
