2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoDiscordLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Set Up Discord Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Add the bot to your Discord server:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoDiscordLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 3.9495-1.5219 6.0023-3.0294a.077.077 0 00.0313-.0552c.5004-5.177-.8382-9.6739-3.5485-13.6604a.061.061 0 00-.0312-.0286zM8.02 15.3312c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9555-2.4189 2.157-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Add Bot to Discord Server\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Select the server where you want the reading group channel</li>\n                        <li>Authorize the bot with the requested permissions</li>\n                        <li>The bot will create a <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong> channel</li>\n                        <li>An invite link will be automatically generated for your members</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After adding the bot, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual Discord setup */}\n              {(!listing.discordBotConfigured || showDiscordManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                      How to create a Discord invite:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Discord and create a new server (or use an existing one)</li>\n                      <li>Create a text channel (e.g., <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong>)</li>\n                      <li>Right-click the channel and select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite People</strong></li>\n                      <li>Click <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Edit invite link</strong> and set it to <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Never expire</strong></li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://discord.gg/AbCdEfG</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://discord.gg/...\"\n                        value={discordLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setDiscordLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: discordLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : discordLink && !discordLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {discordLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {discordLink && !discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Discord link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleDiscordSave}\n                      disabled={discordSaving || !discordLink || !!discordLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\", backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\" }}\n                    >\n                      {discordSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Discord invite link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Discord invite link once\n                they set up the server. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}\n      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})\n          </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                >\n                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>\n                  {applicant.bio && (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                    >\n                      {applicant.bio}\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}\n                  </button>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Rate Members — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mt-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Rate Your Reading Partners</h2>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            How was your experience reading with this group? Rate each member to help build the community.\n          </p>\n\n          {ratingMessage && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n              style={{\n                color: ratingMessage.includes(\"saved\")\n                  ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                  : \"var(--color-error)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              {ratingMessage}\n            </p>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n            {listing.members\n              .filter((m) => m.id !== listing.currentUserId)\n              .map((member) => {\n                const existingRating = givenRatings[member.id];\n                const currentScore = ratingScores[member.id] || 0;\n\n                return (\n                  <div\n                    key={member.id}\n                    className=\"p-3 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: existingRating\n                        ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.04)\"\n                        : \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)\",\n                      border: `1px solid ${\n                        existingRating\n                          ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.12)\"\n                          : \"var(--color-border)\"\n                      }`,\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\">\n                      <div\n                        className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white\"\n                        style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                      </div>\n                      <span\n                        className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                        style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name}\n                      </span>\n                      {existingRating && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"badge ml-auto\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                            color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.65rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          Rated\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Star rating */}\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 mb-2\">\n                      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (\n                        <button\n                          key={star}\n                          onClick={() =>\n                            setRatingScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, [member.id]: star }))\n                          }\n                          className=\"transition-transform hover:scale-110\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            cursor: \"pointer\",\n                            fontSize: \"1.25rem\",\n                            color:\n                              star <= currentScore\n                                ? \"#f59e0b\"\n                                : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                            padding: \"0 1px\",\n                          }}\n                          aria-label={`${star} star${star !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}`}\n                        >\n                          {star <= currentScore ? \"\\u2605\" : \"\\u2606\"}\n                        </button>\n                      ))}\n                      {currentScore > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"text-xs ml-1\"\n                          style={{\n                            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {currentScore}/5\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Comment (optional) */}\n                    <input\n                      type=\"text\"\n                      className=\"input-field text-sm mb-2\"\n                      placeholder=\"Optional comment...\"\n                      value={ratingComments[member.id] || \"\"}\n                      onChange={(e) =>\n                        setRatingComments((prev) => ({\n                          ...prev,\n                          [member.id]: e.target.value,\n                        }))\n                      }\n                      style={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}\n                    />\n\n                    <button\n                      className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition-colors\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor:\n                          currentScore > 0\n                            ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                            : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                        color: currentScore > 0 ? \"white\" : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                        border: \"none\",\n                        cursor: currentScore > 0 ? \"pointer\" : \"not-allowed\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                      onClick={() => handleRatingSubmit(member.id)}\n                      disabled={!currentScore || ratingSaving === member.id}\n                    >\n                      {ratingSaving === member.id\n                        ? \"Saving...\"\n                        : existingRating\n                          ? \"Update Rating\"\n                          : \"Submit Rating\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                );\n              })}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":48,"oldLines":7,"newStart":48,"newLines":7,"lines":["   discord_link: string;"," }"," ","-export default function ListingDetailPage() {","+export default function ListingDetail() {","   const { id } = useParams();","   const router = useRouter();","   const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HYWoKhdjXAkkoidPEYrd12","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G452cF2AddqzUC9s9ucRD3","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx","content":"import type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport ListingDetail from \"./ListingDetail\";\n\ninterface ListingRow {\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n}\n\nexport async function generateMetadata({\n  params,\n}: {\n  params: Promise<{ id: string }>;\n}): Promise<Metadata> {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return { title: \"Listing not found — Bookmate\" };\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.reading_pace,\n              l.max_group_size, u.display_name as author_name\n       FROM listings l\n       JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n       WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as ListingRow | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return { title: \"Listing not found — Bookmate\" };\n  }\n\n  const title = `${listing.book_title} by ${listing.book_author} — Bookmate`;\n  const description = `Join a reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}. Pace: ${listing.reading_pace}. Up to ${listing.max_group_size} readers. Posted by ${listing.author_name}.`;\n\n  return {\n    title,\n    description,\n    openGraph: {\n      title,\n      description,\n      type: \"article\",\n      ...(listing.book_cover_url\n        ? {\n            images: [\n              {\n                url: listing.book_cover_url,\n                alt: `Cover of ${listing.book_title}`,\n              },\n            ],\n          }\n        : {}),\n    },\n    twitter: {\n      card: listing.book_cover_url ? \"summary_large_image\" : \"summary\",\n      title,\n      description,\n      ...(listing.book_cover_url ? { images: [listing.book_cover_url] } : {}),\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nexport default function ListingPage() {\n  return <ListingDetail />;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":186,"cache_read_input_tokens":41863,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":186},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"81579ca0-ad19-4847-a3d6-c2424d9cbdd7"}

(","-            <img","-              src={listing.book_cover_url}","-              alt={listing.book_title}","-              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"","-              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}","-            />","-          ) : (","-            <div","-              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"","-              style={{","-                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",","-                flexShrink: 0,","-              }}","-            >","-              📖","-            </div>","-          )}","-","-          <div className=\"flex-1\">","-            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>","-            <p","-              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"","-              style={{","-                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",","-                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-              }}","-            >","-              by {listing.book_author}","-            </p>","-","-            {listing.requires_approval ? required","-              </span>","-            ) : null}","-","-            <div","-              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"","-              style={{ fontFamily: })}","-                </div>","-              </div>","-              <div>","-                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>","-                  Format","-                </span>","-                <div className=\"font-semibold\">","-                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}","-                </div>","-              </div>","- <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">","-              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers","-            </span>","-            {spotsLeft > 0 && (","-              <span","- </button>","-          )}","-","-          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (","-            <span","-              className=\"badge\"","-              style={{","-             {/* Manual setup (shown as fallback or when bot is not configured) */}","-              {(!listing.telegramBotConfigured || showManualFallback) && (","-                <div>","-           style={{","-                          background: \"none\",","-                          border: \"none\",","-                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",","-            <div","-                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"","-                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}","-                  >","-                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>","-                      How to create a Telegram group:","-                    </p>","-                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>","-                      <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>","-                      <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>","-                      <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>","-                      <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>","-                      <li>","-                        Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}","-                        <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>","-                      </li>","-                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>","-                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>","-                    </ol>","-                  </div>","-","-                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">","-                    <div className=\"flex-1\">","-                      <input","-                        type=\"url\"","-                        className=\"input-field\"","-                        placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"","-                        value={telegramLink}","-                        onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}","-                        style={{","-                          borderColor: telegramLinkError","-                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"","-                            : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError","-                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"","-                              : undefined,","-                        }}","-                      />","-                      {telegramLinkError && (","-                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>","-                          {telegramLinkError}","-                        </p>","-                      )}","-                      {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (","-                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>","-                          Valid Telegram link","-                        </p>","-                      )}","-                    </div>","-                    <button","-                      className=\"btn-primary\"","-                      onClick={handleTelegramSave}","-                      disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}","-                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}","-                    >","-                      {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}","-                    </button>","-                  </div>","-                </div>","-              )}","-            </div>","-          ) : (","-            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>","-              <p","-                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"","-                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}","-              >","-                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...","-              </p>","-              <p","-                className=\"text-xs\"","-                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}","-              >","-                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once","-                they set up the group. generated for your members</li>","-                      </ol>","-                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>","-
