           style={{","-                          background: \"none\",","-                          border: \"none\",","-                          color: \"#5865F2\",","-                          font: \"inherit\",","-                          padding: 0,","-                        }}","-                        onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(false)}","-                      >","-                        Back to automatic setup","-                      </button>","-                    </p>","-                  )}","-","-                  <div","-                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"","-                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\" }}","-                  >","-                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>","-                      How to create a Discord invite:","-                    </p>","-                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>","-                      <li>Open Discord and create a new server (or use an existing one)</li>","-                      <li>Create a text channel (e.g., <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong>)</li>","-                      <li>Right-click the channel and select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite People</strong></li>","-                      <li>Click <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Edit invite link</strong> and set it to <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Never expire</strong></li>","-                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://discord.gg/AbCdEfG</code>)</li>","-                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>","-                    </ol>","-                  </div>","-","-                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">","-                    <div className=\"flex-1\">","-                      <input","-                        type=\"url\"","-                        className=\"input-field\"","-                        placeholder=\"https://discord.gg/...\"","-                        value={discordLink}","-                        onChange={(e) => setDiscordLink(e.target.value)}","-                        style={{","-                          borderColor: discordLinkError","-                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"","-                            : discordLink && !discordLinkError","-                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"","-                              : undefined,","-                        }}","-                      />","-                      {discordLinkError && (","-                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>","-                          {discordLinkError}","-                        </p>","-                      )}","-                      {discordLink && !discordLinkError && (","-                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>","-                          Valid Discord link","-                        </p>","-                      )}","-                    </div>","-                    <button","-                      className=\"btn-primary\"","-                      onClick={handleDiscordSave}","-                      disabled={discordSaving || !discordLink || !!discordLinkError}","-                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\", backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\" }}","-                    >","-                      {discordSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}","-                    </button>","-                  </div>","-                </div>","-              )}","-            </div>","-          ) : (","-            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>","-              <p","-                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"","-                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}","-              >","-                Waiting for the organizer to share the Discord invite link...","-              </p>","-              <p","-                className=\"text-xs\"","-                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}","-              >","-                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Discord invite link once","-                they set up the server. Check back soon!","-              </p>","-            </div>","-          )}","-        </div>","-      )}","-","-      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}","-      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (","-        <div className=\"card mb-6\">","-          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">","-            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})","-          </h2>","-          <div className=\"space-y-3\">","-            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (","-              <div","-                key={applicant.application_id}","-                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"","-                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","-              >","-                <div","-                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"","-                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}","-                >","-                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}","-                </div>","-                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">","-                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>","-                  {applicant.bio && (","-                    <div","-                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"","-                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}","-                    >","-                      {applicant.bio}","-                    </div>","-                  )}","-                </div>","-                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>","-                  <button","-                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"","-                    style={{","-                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",","-                      color: \"white\",","-                      border: \"none\",","-                    }}","-                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}","-                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}","-                  >","-                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}","-                  </button>","-                  <button","-                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"","-                    style={{","-                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",","-                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",","-                      border: \"none\",","-                    }}","-                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}","-                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}","-                  >","-                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}","-                  </button>","-                </div>","-              </div>","-            ))}","-          </div>","-        </div>","-      )}","-","-      {/* Members */}","-      <div className=\"card\">","-        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">","-          Readers ({listing.memberCount})","-        </h2>","-        <div className=\"space-y-3\">","-          {listing.members.map((member) => (","-            <div","-              key={member.id}","-              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"","-              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","-            >","-              <div","-                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"","-                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}","-              >","-                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}","-              </div>","-              <div>","-                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">","-                  {member.display_name}","-                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (","-                    <span","-                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"","-                      style={{","-                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",","-                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",","-                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",","-                      }}","-                    >","-                      Organizer","-                    </span>","-                  )}","-                </div>","-                {member.bio && (","-                  <div","-                    className=\"text-xs\"","-                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}","-                  >","-                    {member.bio}","-                  </div>","-                )}","-              </div>","-            </div>","-          ))}","-        </div>","-      </div>","-","-      {/* Rate Members — visible to members when group is full */}","-      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (","-        <div className=\"card mt-6\">","-          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Rate Your Reading Partners</h2>","-          <p","-            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"","-            style={{","-              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",","-              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-            }}","-          >","-            How was your experience reading with this group? Rate each member to help build the community.","-          </p>","-","-          {ratingMessage && (","-            <p","-              className=\"text-sm mb-3\"","-              style={{","-                color: ratingMessage.includes(\"saved\")","-                  ? \"var(--color-success)\"","-                  : \"var(--color-error)\",","-                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-              }}","-            >","-              {ratingMessage}","-            </p>","-          )}","-","-          <div className=\"space-y-4\">","-            {listing.members","-              .filter((m) => m.id !== listing.currentUserId)","-              .map((member) => {","-                const existingRating = givenRatings[member.id];","-                const currentScore = ratingScores[member.id] || 0;","-","-                return (","-                  <div","-                    key={member.id}","-                    className=\"p-3 rounded-lg\"","-                    style={{","-                      backgroundColor: existingRating","-                        ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.04)\"","-                        : \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)\",","-                      border: `1px solid ${","-                        existingRating","-                          ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.12)\"","-                          : \"var(--color-border)\"","-                      }`,","-                    }}","-                  >","-                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\">","-                      <div","-                        className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white\"","-                        style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}","-                      >","-                        {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}","-                      </div>","-                      <span","-                        className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"","-                        style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","-                      >","-                        {member.display_name}","-                      </span>","-                      {existingRating && (","-                        <span","-                          className=\"badge ml-auto\"","-                          style={{","-                            backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",","-                            color: \"var(--color-success)\",","-                            fontSize: \"0.65rem\",","-                          }}","-                        >","-                          Rated","-                        </span>","-                      )}","-                    </div>","-","-                    {/* Star rating */}","-                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 mb-2\">","-                      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (","-                        <button","-                          key={star}","-                          onClick={() =>","-                            setRatingScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, [member.id]: star }))","-                          }","-                          className=\"transition-transform hover:scale-110\"","-                          style={{","-                            background: \"none\",","-                            border: \"none\",","-                            cursor: \"pointer\",","-                            fontSize: \"1.25rem\",","-                            color:","-                              star <= currentScore","-                                ? \"#f59e0b\"","-                                : \"var(--color-border)\",","-                            padding: \"0 1px\",","-                          }}","-                          aria-label={`${star} star${star !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}`}","-                        >","-                          {star <= currentScore ? \"\\u2605\" : \"\\u2606\"}","-                        </button>","-                      ))}","-                      {currentScore > 0 && (","-                        <span","-                          className=\"text-xs ml-1\"","-                          style={{","-                            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",","-                            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-                          }}","-                        >","-                          {currentScore}/5","-                        </span>","-                      )}","-                    </div>","-","-                    {/* Comment (optional) */}","-                    <input","-                      type=\"text\"","-                      className=\"input-field text-sm mb-2\"","-                      placeholder=\"Optional comment...\"","-                      value={ratingComments[member.id] || \"\"}","-                      onChange={(e) =>","-                        setRatingComments((prev) => ({","-                          ...prev,","-                          [member.id]: e.target.value,","-                        }))","-                      }","-                      style={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}","-                    />","-","-                    <button","-                      className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition-colors\"","-                      style={{","-                        backgroundColor:","-                          currentScore > 0","-                            ? \"var(--color-accent)\"","-                            : \"var(--color-border)\",","-                        color: currentScore > 0 ? \"white\" : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",","-                        border: \"none\",","-                        cursor: currentScore > 0 ? \"pointer\" : \"not-allowed\",","-                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-                      }}","-                      onClick={() => handleRatingSubmit(member.id)}","-                      disabled={!currentScore || ratingSaving === member.id}","-                    >","-                      {ratingSaving === member.id","-                        ? \"Saving...\"","-                        : existingRating","-                          ? \"Update Rating\"","-                          : \"Submit Rating\"}","-                    </button>","-                  </div>","-                );","-              })}","-          </div>","-        </div>","-      )}","-","-      <p","-        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"","-        style={{","-          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",","-          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","-        }}","-      >","-        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}","-        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {","-          month: \"long\",","-          day: \"numeric\",","-          year: \"numeric\",","-        })}","-      </p>","-    </div>","-  );","+export default function ListingPage() {","+  return <ListingDetail />;"," }"]}],"originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n  currentUserId: number | null;\n  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  // Discord state\n  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Rating state\n  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n      setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    } else if (res.status === 404) {\n      setNotAvailable(true);\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (!id) return;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.givenRatings) {\n        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n        }\n        setGivenRatings(given);\n        setRatingScores(scores);\n        setRatingComments(comments);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n\n  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n    if (!score) return;\n    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n          ratedUserId: memberId,\n          score,\n          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n      } else {\n        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n        }));\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n    } finally {\n      setRatingSaving(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n    setDiscordSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDiscordSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (notAvailable) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Browse other listings\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            {listing.requires_approval ? (\n              <span\n                className=\"badge mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                  color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Approval required\n              </span>\n            ) : null}\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Chat platform section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference !== \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.telegramBotConfigured && !showManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoTelegramLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Create a Telegram group with one click — the bot will\n                        automatically generate an invite link for your readers.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoTelegram}\n                        disabled={autoTelegramLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoTelegramLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Create Telegram Group Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Click the link below to create the group:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoTelegramLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Open Telegram & Create Group\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Telegram will open and ask you to create a group</li>\n                        <li>Name it something like &quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</li>\n                        <li>The bot will automatically generate an invite link</li>\n                        <li>All members will be notified — no manual steps needed!</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After creating the group, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual setup (shown as fallback or when bot is not configured) */}\n              {(!listing.telegramBotConfigured || showManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                      How to create a Telegram group:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                      <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                      <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                      <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                      <li>\n                        Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                        <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                      </li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                        value={telegramLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {telegramLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Telegram link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                      disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                    >\n                      {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Discord channel section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\" style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}>\n            <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n              <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 3.9495-1.5219 6.0023-3.0294a.077.077 0 00.0313-.0552c.5004-5.177-.8382-9.6739-3.5485-13.6604a.061.061 0 00-.0312-.0286zM8.02 15.3312c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9555-2.4189 2.157-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n            </svg>\n            Discord Channel\n          </h2>\n\n          {listing.discord_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Discord server to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.discord_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{\n                  display: \"inline-flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868           </svg>\n                Join Discord Server\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.discord_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Discord server (or use an existing one) and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when Discord bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.discordBotConfigured && !showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoDiscordLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server — it will\n                        automatically create a reading group channel and invite link.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoDiscord}\n                        disabled={autoDiscordLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoDiscordLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Set Up Discord Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Add the bot to your Discord server:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoDiscordLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Add Bot to Discord Server\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Select the server where you want the reading group channel</li>\n                        <li>Authorize the bot with the requested permissions</li>\n                        <li>The bot will create a <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong> channel</li>\n                        <li>An invite link will be automatically generated for your members</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After adding the bot, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual Discord setup */}\n              {(!listing.discordBotConfigured || showDiscordManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                      How to create a Discord invite:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Discord and create a new server (or use an existing one)</li>\n                      <li>Create a text channel (e.g., <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong>)</li>\n                      <li>Right-click the channel and select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite People</strong></li>\n                      <li>Click <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Edit invite link</strong> and set it to <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Never expire</strong></li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://discord.gg/AbCdEfG</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://discord.gg/...\"\n                        value={discordLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setDiscordLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: discordLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : discordLink && !discordLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {discordLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {discordLink && !discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Discord link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleDiscordSave}\n                      disabled={discordSaving || !discordLink || !!discordLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\", backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\" }}\n                    >\n                      {discordSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Discord invite link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Discord invite link once\n                they set up the server. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}\n      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})\n          </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                >\n                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>\n                  {applicant.bio && (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                    >\n                      {applicant.bio}\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}\n                  </button>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Rate Members — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mt-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Rate Your Reading Partners</h2>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            How was your experience reading with this group? Rate each member to help build the community.\n          </p>\n\n          {ratingMessage && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n              style={{\n                color: ratingMessage.includes(\"saved\")\n                  ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                  : \"var(--color-error)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              {ratingMessage}\n            </p>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n            {listing.members\n              .filter((m) => m.id !== listing.currentUserId)\n              .map((member) => {\n                const existingRating = givenRatings[member.id];\n                const currentScore = ratingScores[member.id] || 0;\n\n                return (\n                  <div\n                    key={member.id}\n                    className=\"p-3 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: existingRating\n                        ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.04)\"\n                        : \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)\",\n                      border: `1px solid ${\n                        existingRating\n                          ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.12)\"\n                          : \"var(--color-border)\"\n                      }`,\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\">\n                      <div\n                        className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white\"\n                        style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                      </div>\n                      <span\n                        className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                        style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name}\n                      </span>\n                      {existingRating && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"badge ml-auto\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                            color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.65rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          Rated\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Star rating */}\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 mb-2\">\n                      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (\n                        <button\n                          key={star}\n                          onClick={() =>\n                            setRatingScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, [member.id]: star }))\n                          }\n                          className=\"transition-transform hover:scale-110\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            cursor: \"pointer\",\n                            fontSize: \"1.25rem\",\n                            color:\n                              star <= currentScore\n                                ? \"#f59e0b\"\n                                : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                            padding: \"0 1px\",\n                          }}\n                          aria-label={`${star} star${star !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}`}\n                        >\n                          {star <= currentScore ? \"\\u2605\" : \"\\u2606\"}\n                        </button>\n                      ))}\n                      {currentScore > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"text-xs ml-1\"\n                          style={{\n                            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {currentScore}/5\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Comment (optional) */}\n                    <input\n                      type=\"text\"\n                      className=\"input-field text-sm mb-2\"\n                      placeholder=\"Optional comment...\"\n                      value={ratingComments[member.id] || \"\"}\n                      onChange={(e) =>\n                        setRatingComments((prev) => ({\n                          ...prev,\n                          [member.id]: e.target.value,\n                        }))\n                      }\n                      style={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}\n                    />\n\n                    <button\n                      className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition-colors\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor:\n                          currentScore > 0\n                            ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                            : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                        color: currentScore > 0 ? \"white\" : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                        border: \"none\",\n                        cursor: currentScore > 0 ? \"pointer\" : \"not-allowed\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                      onClick={() => handleRatingSubmit(member.id)}\n                      disabled={!currentScore || ratingSaving === member.id}\n                    >\n                      {ratingSaving === member.id\n                        ? \"Saving...\"\n                        : existingRating\n                          ? \"Update Rating\"\n                          : \"Submit Rating\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                );\n              })}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n"}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PxZg6WMf2fNLqZg8Brh5yo","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import type { Metadata } from \"next\";\n     2→import \"./globals.css\";\n     3→import Navbar from \"@/components/Navbar\";\n     4→\n     5→export const metadata: Metadata = {\n     6→  title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n     7→  description:\n     8→    \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n     9→};\n    10→\n    11→export default function RootLayout({\n    12→  children,\n    13→}: {\n    14→  children: React.ReactNode;\n    15→}) {\n    16→  return (\n    17→    <html lang=\"en\">\n    18→      <body className=\"min-h-screen\">\n    19→        <Navbar />\n    20→        <main className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-8\">{children}</main>\n    21→      </body>\n    22→    </html>\n    23→  );\n    24→}\n    25→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"a56c9643-a0e0-440b-b4a8-5ebdbce91053","timestamp":"2026-03-20T17:03:59.382Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/layout.tsx","content":"import type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport \"./globals.css\";\nimport Navbar from \"@/components/Navbar\";\n\nexport const metadata: Metadata = {\n  title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n  description:\n    \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SETX4ftW8YstkruqCNxHuV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WfkJm4TwWFJhMHkTUVVCSY","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"gh issue create --title \"Production readiness: health endpoint, custom 404, OG meta tags\" --label \"P1,approved\" --body \"## What\n\nAdd production-readiness improvements:\n\n1. **Health check endpoint** (\\`/api/health\\`) — returns DB connectivity, uptime, user/listing stats. Returns 503 on failure.\n2. **Custom 404 page** — branded 404 page with link back to listings, replacing the default Next.js 404.\n3. **Open Graph + Twitter Card meta tags** — listing pages now include proper OG/Twitter meta tags with book title, author, description, and cover image. Makes shared links look great on social media.\n4. **Root layout OG tags** — homepage and other pages have base OG metadata.\n\n## Why\n\nThese are standard production-readiness improvements:\n- Health endpoint enables external monitoring\n- Custom 404 improves user experience\n- OG tags make shared links attractive on social media/messaging\" 2>/dev/null","description":"Create GitHub issue"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":223,"cache_read_input_tokens":45855,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":223},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"8525f27c-9203-4602-814d-a5e200a8d6fb"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01597nxzvJXEqCxU4SD4hGKj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019x4jVmNxa8zae71vAYcQfv","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"gh pr create --title \"feat: health endpoint, custom 404, OG meta tags\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- Adds `/api/health` endpoint returning DB connectivity, uptime, and user/listing stats (503 on failure)\n- Custom branded 404 page replacing the default Next.js 404\n- Open Graph + Twitter Card meta tags on listing detail pages (book title, author, cover image)\n- Base OG metadata in root layout for all pages\n\nCloses #40\n\n## Test plan\n- [ ] `curl /api/health` returns JSON with `status: \"healthy\"`\n- [ ] Navigate to `/nonexistent` to see branded 404 page\n- [ ] Share a listing URL and verify OG preview shows book cover and title\n- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)\n- [ ] Lint passes (`npx next lint`)\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" 2>/dev/null","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":276,"cache_read_input_tokens":47017,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":276},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"26590e46-e87c-4abe-953c-5d6dee46bfc3","uuid":"e2811075-fb38-4722-ae28-42a1751bb53c"}
